description_long: This is a countertop stand mixer, predominantly white with a metallic mixing bowl attached to its base. The body is robust and rounded, featuring a tilt-head design that allows the top section to lift for easy bowl access. A coiled power cord is visible, wrapped around the back, and the mixer head includes a beater attachment inside the bowl. The bowl is made of shiny stainless steel, contrasting with the matte white finish of the main chassis. There are visible control elements on the side, and a brand label is present on the head, indicating it is a KitchenAid mixer.
description: A white KitchenAid stand mixer with a metallic bowl and a tilt-head design, featuring a coiled power cord and visible control elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white mixer body, metallic bowl, and beater attachment, with the power cord partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the coiled power cord, ventilation grilles, and a warning label on the back of the mixer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mixer’s profile, bowl, and the attachment point for the beater.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the metallic bowl, beater attachment, and the KitchenAid brand label on the head.
attribute_brand_logo: KitchenAid logo is visible on the front of the mixer head.
attribute_control_panel_type: Analog control knob with printed speed settings on the side of the chassis.
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a rounded, robust form and a tilt-head mechanism.
